title: Surreal Street Style Fashion Scene Three Young
sourceTitle: Surreal Street Style Fashion Scene Three Young

imagePrompts.prompt: A surreal street-style fashion scene of three young men standing side by side on a European city street, each holding an oversized cutout of their own head above their body, creating a playful exaggerated proportion effect. Their real bodies are visible below, dressed in vintage-inspired streetwear flared denim jeans, layered jackets in brown and black tones, long coats, and retro accessories. Each oversized head features distinct styling: one with short dreadlocks and bold white sunglasses, one wearing a black durag with clear glasses, and one in a black cap with tinted sunglasses. The setting is an urban street with tram tracks, pedestrians in the background, and classic European architecture buildings with textured facades and signage. Composition is centered and symmetrical, straight-on eye-level shot. Lighting is natural daylight with soft shadows, realistic tones. Style is ultra-detailed, photorealistic with a slight surreal/artsy twist, crisp textures, natural skin detail, high-fashion editorial meets street photography, 4K quality.
